snippet.title: SONG SUNG BLUE - Official Trailer 2 [HD] - Only In Theaters This Christmas
snippet.description:
An ordinary couple. An extraordinary dream. Watch the new trailer for SONG SUNG BLUE, starring Hugh Jackman and Kate Hudson. Only in theaters this Christmas. 

Based on a true story, two down-on-their-luck musicians (Hugh Jackman and Kate Hudson) form a joyous Neil Diamond tribute band, proving it's never too late to find love and follow your dreams.
